title: Parallel SMT Consumer Processing
description: Async parallel SMT application with consumer delivery and optional type conversion before consumer callback

AbstractRecordProcessor: void initialize(ExecutorService recordService, Transformations transformations)  // sets fields
ProcessingCallables.TransformAndConvertR: R call()  // applies transformations.transform(record), then converter.apply(transformed)

activity_flow_ParallelSmtConsumerProcess: Log: submit N records for processing
FORK — for each record (parallel): submit TransformRecord callable to recordService → Future<SourceRecord>[] recordFutures
[TransformRecord.call]: transformations.transform(record) → return transformedRecord (or null if filtered)
JOIN — iterate records in original order:
For each i: recordFutures[i].get() → SourceRecord record (blocks until transformation done)
committer.markProcessed(originalRecord)  // always mark, even if filtered
activity_flow_ParallelSmtAndConvertConsu: Log: submit N records for processing
FORK — for each record (parallel): submit TransformAndConvertRecord callable to recordService → Future<R>[] recordFutures
[TransformAndConvertRecord.call]: transformations.transform(record) → if not null: convertor.apply(transformed) → return R; else return null
JOIN — iterate records in original order:
For each i: recordFutures[i].get() → R record (blocks until transform+convert done)
YES → consumer.accept(record)  // consumer receives converted type R
key_differences: ParallelSmtConsumerProcessor: transform only → deliver SourceRecord to Consumer<SourceRecord>
ParallelSmtAndConvertConsumerProcessor: transform + type-convert (Function<SourceRecord,R>) → deliver R to Consumer<R>
Both preserve original record order for consumer delivery despite parallel transformation
Both use Future[] array pattern: submit all in parallel, then collect in order
Null records (filtered by transformations) are skipped for consumer but still marked processed
concurrency_model: ExecutorService (recordService) submits individual record callables in parallel. Main thread collects results via Future.get() in insertion order, serializing consumer delivery while parallelizing transformation/conversion work.
error_handling: StopEngineException from consumer triggers immediate markProcessed + rethrow, stopping the engine. Other exceptions propagate up from processRecords to caller.
key_relationships: Both processors depend_on ExecutorService (injected via initialize)
Both processors depend_on Transformations (injected via initialize)
